titles.title: When There Is No Hope, There Is Grace

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Tossing and turning, sleep just won`t come. You hate to see the sun rise on another day. And you dread the sorrow that waits for tomorrow. You're out of hope but thank God for grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When there's no hope, there is grace. When you feel too weak to stand, let the blood take your place. There's no trial He can't erase. When there's no hope, thank God for grace. When there's no hope, thank God for grace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the hours in your days seem like eternity. Oh no matter what you do the pain just wont leave. You start to think that life is over, your burdens hard to bear. Remember at your lowest, He is always there.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So no matter what you're going through the blood will prevail. Just past all the sorrow, remember He's still there.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's no trial He can't erase. When there's no hope, thank God for grace. When there's no hope, thank God for grace.
